title: pinus montana var. pumilio
intro: Pinus montana var. pumilio, also known as the Pyrenean Mountain Pine or Pyrenean Dwarf Pine, is a subspecies of pine tree native to the Pyrenees mountains between France and Spain. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds found in its resin and needles. The health benefits of Pinus montana var. pumilio include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to create topical treatments and natural remedies for various health conditions.
